user.title: Set up HA Speaks
user.description: Choose the TTS entity HA Speaks should use for media player announcements.

error.no_tts_entities: No TTS entities were found. Add a TTS integration first.

add_group.title: Add speech group
add_group.description: TTS media players use Home Assistant TTS. Alexa media players use notify.alexa_media. Alexa targets are optional comma-separated advanced targets.

edit_group_details.title: Edit speech group
edit_group_details.description: TTS media players use Home Assistant TTS. Alexa media players use notify.alexa_media. Alexa targets are optional comma-separated advanced targets.
